overall.description: Aerial drone footage sweeping across a vast snow-covered mountain range in a game engine environment. The camera glides smoothly over pristine glaciers and rocky peaks during golden hour lighting, revealing expansive valleys and distant mountain horizons with no visible human activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: alpine glacier ridge with snow-covered peaks

agents.ego_description: piloting drone forward over pristine snowfield toward mountain peaks

entered.detail: tall snow-covered mountain peak with rocky outcrops on the left side of frame
smooth snow-covered glacier surface in the immediate foreground
wind-formed snow ridges and drifts in the mid-ground
layered mountain ranges fading into the distance under clouds

segments.scene_description: The drone moves forward over an expansive snow-covered glacier, approaching a prominent mountain peak on the left. The terrain is pristine white with wind-formed drifts, and distant mountain ranges stack along the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: glacier valley with exposed rock faces

events.description: camera pans right revealing expansive glacier valley and dark exposed rock faces on the right

agents.ego_description: panning drone right to survey the valley and mountain range

entered.detail: dark rocky mountain face with minimal snow coverage on the right side
deep valley between mountain ranges showing ice and snow formations

segments.scene_description: As the drone pans right, the view opens to reveal a deep glacier valley and dark exposed rock faces on the right. The primary peak recedes into the left background while the camera surveys the expansive mountain range extending toward a distant horizon.

events.description: camera pans left returning focus to the primary snow peak

agents.ego_description: panning drone left to return to original heading while maintaining forward motion

entered.detail: wind-formed snow ridges reappearing in the mid-ground

segments.scene_description: The drone pans left, moving away from the rocky valley view and returning focus to the primary snow-covered peak on the left. The exposed rock faces exit the frame as the camera settles back into the forward glacier view, completing the sweeping aerial survey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial sweep across a pristine glacier that shifts from a focused approach on a single peak to a broad survey of a mountain range. It begins moving forward over expansive white snow and wind-formed drifts, steadily approaching a prominent mountain peak on the left. As the camera pans right, the view opens to reveal a deep glacier valley and dark exposed rock faces, while the primary peak recedes into the background to uncover a vast horizon of stacked mountain ranges. The scene then shifts back as the drone pans left, moving away from the rocky valley and causing the dark cliffs to exit the frame. Finally, the camera returns its focus to the primary snow-covered peak, settling back into a forward glide over the glacier to complete the survey.
